name: io.github.Lakshmi-Chakradhar-Vijayarao/credence
title: Credence — Epistemic Guard
description: Epistemic guard for AI coding: tracks uncertain values and blocks writes until verified.

tools.name: credence_register
tools.description: Register an uncertain value or claim from conversation

tools.name: credence_verify
tools.description: Mark a constraint as verified with evidence

tools.name: credence_gate
tools.description: Check whether a planned write/execute action is safe to proceed

tools.name: credence_autoverify
tools.description: Auto-verify constraints matched in a user message

tools.name: credence_constraints
tools.description: List all unverified constraints for a session

tools.name: credence_scan
tools.description: Annotate generated code with unverified value warnings

tools.name: credence_self_probe
tools.description: Extract and register domain-relevant values from generated code

tools.name: credence_session_summary
tools.description: Plain-English digest of all unverified constraints for agent handoffs

tools.name: credence_memory_snapshot
tools.description: Persist unverified constraints across session boundaries

tools.name: credence_memory_recall
tools.description: Inject prior-session unverified constraints into current context
